response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and appropriate seniority level, there is a critical mismatch with core role requirements. The position explicitly requires 8–12 years of C++ expertise in high-performance, industrial systems; this resume shows only 6 months of documented C++ work (2014–2015) and zero experience in industrial automation, IoT, or manufacturing domains. The candidate's extensive background is in web/backend systems (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang), fintech, and SaaS—fields that share neither the language focus nor the domain expertise required for this role.
strengths: Strong commitment to software craftsmanship with proven TDD and agile practices across multiple roles
Demonstrated seniority and leadership capability (staff-level roles, mentoring, workshop instruction)
Polyglot developer with ability to learn new languages and domains quickly
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (only 6 months documented at National Instruments in 2014–2015); resume shows no recent or substantial C++ work
No background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, manufacturing, or industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443)
Missing formal engineering degree (B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech); holds general CS degree and additional arts degree instead

key_factors.factor: Software engineering fundamentals and seniority level
